title: limonium tubiflorum subsp. zanonii
intro: Limonium tubiflorum subsp. zanonii, also known as Zanon's sea lavender, is a plant species in the Plumbaginaceae family, native to Italy and Greece. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Zanon's sea lavender include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
